calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2008 Continued To Dec-26-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., a California corporation.
Justine Payton, plaintiff's Accounts Receivable Supervisor, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Real Estate Raz, Inc.
Amended default entered against defendant on October 30, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 29, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good causea appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., a California corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Real Estate Raz, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $26,666.60.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,330.75.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $390.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $31,381.35.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than Monday, November 10, 2008.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2008 Continued To Nov-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
